old_value: {"id":"smallhold-poi3","title":"FEP-e232: Object Links for quote posts and structured references","description":"Implement FEP-e232 (Object Links). When a post contains a URL that points to another ActivityPub object (another post, another actor), add a structured Link tag to the Note's tag array: {\"type\": \"Link\", \"href\": \"https://remote/post/123\", \"name\": \"RE: ...\", \"mediaType\": \"application/activity+json\"}. This enables quote-post interop with Mastodon, Threads, Pleroma, Sharkey, and 12+ other implementations. Inbound: when receiving a Note with Link tags, render them as quoted/linked content in the Status JSON. ~100-150 lines.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-19T00:40:10.645060734Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T00:40:10.645060734Z"}
